content.thinking:
It's 09:47 on Monday, June 8th, 2026 in Asia/Shanghai. Let me check HEARTBEAT.md to see what needs to be done.

Looking at HEARTBEAT.md:
- 工作日 9:30-11:30 — 上午工作时段
- 工作日 13:30-18:00 — 下午工作时段
- 工作日 11:30-13:30 — 午休，不打扰
- 18:00 之后 — 下班时间，不打扰
- 周末 — 休息日，不打扰

It's 09:47, which is during 上午工作时段 (9:30-11:30). 


Now I'm reviewing the reminders to see what applies at this moment. The 喝水提醒 triggers around 10:30, which isn't right now, and the 久坐提醒 requires two hours of continuous work—I can't determine if that's the case without knowing when the session started. There's no 周五 17:00 reminder since it's Monday, and none of the other reminders seem to have a specific time that matches 09:47.

Looking back at what I actually have access to: HEARTBEAT.md gives me the time blocks and the reminders themselves, but I don't have any information about when the user actually started working or any previous reminder timestamps. So there's nothing actionable at this moment—I should just acknowledge that with HEARTBEAT_OK.
